info.name: MIDAZ
info.description:
The CRM API provides a set of endpoints for managing holder data, including information related to their ledger accounts.

**IMPORTANT**: This collection requires the **MIDAZ Environment** to be selected for proper functionality. Please ensure you have imported and selected the MIDAZ environment before using this collection.

item.name: Complete API Workflow
item.description: A sequence of API calls representing a typical workflow, generated from WORKFLOW.md.

request.description: List all Aliases with or without filters. CRM listing endpoints support pagination using the page, limit, and sort parameters. The sort parameter orders results by the entity ID using the UUID v7 standard, which is time-sortable, ensuring chronological ordering of the results.
